problem_family: Apprenti(e) – Concepteur/Développeur Full Stack CARGO Operations E messagingLayer H/F
resources: Conduct analysis, formulate recommendations, propose solutions and develop proof of concept
Identify actions to record and content (date, user, action, value...)
Propose a backup in database and monitoring tools (elastic search / kibana / kafka)
Develop an interface for display and research on these information
Suggest statistical graphs to highlight the number of modifications, which table/data is most modified, by whom...
Propose a representation of these data to be able to use it
Angular 12, Java 17, Spring 5, Oracle, Elasticsearch + Kibana + Kafka
